notes: All 9 reps give a competent generic beach-scene summary (crowd, sand, umbrellas, sailboats, smoking steamships, large blue/white vessel on the right, no text) but NONE of them recognize this as a Where's Waldo image or spot any hidden character (Waldo/Odlaw/Wizard Whitebeard) — the defining feature of the image — so every rep is capped around 6. Distinctive verified details like the submarine, dinghy, cargo ships, hovercraft, Punch and Judy booth, ice cream cart, volleyball, human pyramid, surfboards, and beach huts are uniformly missed; per the dense-scene rule these are treated as key_misses rather than hallucinations. Horses (owner-verified) are correctly noted by t0.1/rep0, t0.1/rep2, t0.7/rep2; dogs by several reps. Only t0.7/rep0 commits a clear hallucination — a 'horse-drawn carriage or wagon' that the ground truth explicitly states is absent. The top-ranked reps (t0.1/rep2, t0.7/rep2) earned their position by correctly noting both horses AND the distant landmasses/horizon detail with no fabrication.
